name: Hybrid Connection Manager Service Installation
notes:
This is rule detects Hybrid Connection Manager service installation.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: HybridConnectionManager Service Installation
SIGMA Description: Rule to detect the Hybrid Connection Manager service installation.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.Service Installed

when the event matches LOWER("Service Full Name Full Full Name Full Full Name") == 'hybridconnectionmanager' AND LOWER("Service Full Name Full Full Name Filename") == 'hybridconnectionmanager' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Hybrid Connection Manager Service Installation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, System.Service Installed

AND when the event matches LOWER("Service Full Name Full Full Name Full Full Name") == 'hybridconnectionmanager' AND LOWER("Service Full Name Full Full Name Filename") == 'hybridconnectionmanager' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Hybrid Connection Manager Service Installation
Event description: Detects Hybrid Connection Manager service installation.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
